meta.name: YODO SERIES
meta.description: Yodo Series is a high School Series that campaigns against various forms of Abuse in the life of an average Teenager in Africa. Where Teenagers are unable to speak up against such Abuse because of fear and threats. The rising cases of sexual abuse, substance abuse, and other related forms of exploitation have become major contributors to mental health challenges among Ghanaian teenagers. One key solution is enabling young people to feel safe and supported enough to speak up to a teacher, guardian, or friend. Unfortunately, fear, threats, and intimidation from abusers often silence them. So Yodo Series was made to address that gap by educating, encouraging, and inspiring students to break the silence.
